ocr.text: In January 2024, the Seasonal Demand Overview for Alibaba Group in the Retail & Consumer Goods sector reveals
comprehensive insights into sales performance across various product categories. The Electronics category achieved remarkable
sales performance with 100,000 units sold, generating a revenue of €15M, reflecting a growth rate of 12.5%. This segment
employed a total headcount of 2,000, and it opened 50 branches, receiving excellent customer feedback and maintaining strong
stock availability. In contrast, the Apparel category outperformed in both volume and revenue, with 200,000 units sold and a
total revenue of €30M, resulting in a significant growth rate of 20.0%.
UnitsSold  Revenue(EUR)  GrowthRate(%)  TotalHeadcount  BranchesOpened  CustomerFeedback  StockAvailability
This category required a total headcount of 3,000 and opened 80 new branches, with customer feedback rated as good, along
with adequate stock availability to meet consumer demand. The Home Goods category, while slightly lower in sales figures,
still demonstrated robust performance with 150,000 units sold, yielding a revenue of €25M and a growth rate of 15.0%. This
segment employed 1,500 personnel, opened 70 branches, and received average customer feedback, with stock availability
deemed satisfactory. Collectively, these performance metrics indicate a diverse and dynamic market landscape for Alibaba
across its product categories, showcasing effective strategies in managing sales channels, regional insights, and customer
engagement, while addressing stock availability to sustain market competitiveness.
